name: Happy Easter Plastic Tub Light Blue - Spritz™
description:
Brighten up your Easter celebrations with the Happy Easter Plastic Tub Light Blue - Spritz™. Crafted from 10% post-consumer recycled plastic, this oval-shaped decorative bucket is perfect for holding treats or gifts. Measuring 9.5 inches in height, 13 inches in depth, and 16 inches in width, it offers ample space for your holiday needs. Its cheerful color and practical design make it a charming addition to your festivities.

Spritz™: Pops of joy that make the moment™
